sections.title: PURPOSE AND SCOPE
sections.llm_prompt: Write Purpose and Scope for validating an analytical method for {product_name} ({process_type}). State the method's intended use (identity/assay/impurities/potency/dissolution), the matrix, target analyte, category of validation per ICH Q2(R2) and USP <1225>. {description}

sections.title: METHOD DESCRIPTION
sections.llm_prompt: Describe the analytical method for {product_name}. Include: principle, instrument (HPLC/UPLC/GC/bioassay/ELISA/qPCR/flow cytometry), column/reagents, mobile phase, detection, sample preparation, system suitability criteria, calculation formula, and reference to the method SOP.

sections.title: VALIDATION PARAMETERS AND ACCEPTANCE CRITERIA
sections.llm_prompt: Generate a validation parameters table per ICH Q2(R2) appropriate for the method type. Columns: Parameter | Definition | Design | Acceptance Criteria.

rows.label: Specificity/Selectivity
rows.value: Demonstrate resolution from impurities, placebo, degradants

rows.label: Range
rows.value: Span of concentrations meeting specificity, linearity, accuracy, precision

sections.title: EXPERIMENTAL DESIGN AND PROCEDURE
sections.llm_prompt: Generate step-by-step experimental procedures for each validation parameter (specificity, linearity, accuracy, precision, LOD/LOQ, robustness, solution stability, filter validation). For each experiment describe: sample preparation, number of replicates, conditions tested, calculations, acceptance criteria.

sections.title: MATERIALS AND EQUIPMENT
sections.llm_prompt: List materials, reagents, reference standards, and equipment required to validate the method for {product_name}. Include grade (USP/HPLC/ACS), manufacturer, and qualification status (calibration, IQ/OQ/PQ).

sections.title: DATA ANALYSIS AND STATISTICAL METHODS
sections.llm_prompt: Describe data analysis approach for the method validation. Include: software used (Empower, Chromeleon, JMP, Minitab), statistical tests (F-test, t-test, ANOVA, regression), outlier handling (Grubbs), reporting format, rounding rules, and pass/fail decision criteria.

sections.title: DEVIATION HANDLING
sections.llm_prompt: Describe how deviations during method validation will be handled. Reference the deviation SOP, root cause analysis expectations, CAPA process, and impact assessment on overall validation conclusions.

sections.title: VALIDATION REPORT REQUIREMENTS
sections.llm_prompt: Describe the validation report contents and approval requirements. Include: summary of results against acceptance criteria, raw data tables, chromatograms/spectra, statistical analysis, conclusion on fitness for purpose, approval signatures (analyst, QC, QA).

sections.title: REFERENCES
sections.llm_prompt: Generate references for an analytical method validation protocol. Include: ICH Q2(R2), USP <1225>, USP <1226> (verification), USP <1033> (biological assay validation), USP <1034> (analysis of biological assays), FDA Guidance on Analytical Procedures and Methods Validation, and relevant company SOPs.
